message:
feat(fnp-python): expose bincount with weights and minlength

Wires the bincount_with core method landed in 3c0656c through the
fnp-python PyO3 surface. The Python binding accepts weights and
minlength kwargs with the same semantics as np.bincount, including
int64-vs-float64 dtype promotion when weights are supplied and the
"weights and list don't have the same length" error parity for
length-mismatched weight arrays. A negative minlength is rejected with
a ValueError up front.

Adds a live-NumPy test that pins the default, weighted, minlength-pad,
minlength-wins, empty-input, and length-mismatch paths against NumPy
2.x oracle output.

Closes franken_numpy-8ma6.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
